Scenario_Name: Daily scheduler fires batch at 10:00
Preconditions: Scheduler enabled for BATCH-CSMS-WELCOME-LINE; eligible T-1 Inforce data exists
Expected_Result: Batch starts automatically; run record created for the date

Scenario_Name: Select ORD/IND/PA issue_date=T-1 Inforce
Preconditions: ORD/IND/PA policies with issue_date=T-1 and status Inforce
Expected_Result: All matching policies enter target set; other types/dates excluded

Scenario_Name: Exclude non-Inforce or wrong issue_date
Preconditions: Policy T-1 but not Inforce; policy Inforce but not T-1
Expected_Result: Neither policy enters target set

Scenario_Name: Exclude pre-2026 policies at year boundary
Preconditions: Policies issued 2025-12-31 and 2026-01-01
Expected_Result: 2025-12-31 excluded; 2026-01-01 included

Scenario_Name: Exclude records with NULL/empty mobile_no
Preconditions: Otherwise-eligible policy with mobile_no NULL/empty/spaces
Expected_Result: Record excluded from target set

Scenario_Name: Exclude Do Not Contact ORD remark_code=1
Preconditions: Eligible ORD policy in ili_policy_remark remark_code='1' type 'O'
Expected_Result: Record removed; no SMS sent

Scenario_Name: Exclude Do Not Contact IND/PA remark_code=4 with type mapping
Preconditions: Eligible IND/PA policy in DNC under mapped type (IND in I/G, PA=P)
Expected_Result: Record removed from target set

Scenario_Name: Eligibility cond1 no LINE no Club send
Preconditions: Line Connect returns E02 for LINE and E02 for APP
Expected_Result: Customer eligible; SMS queued

Scenario_Name: Eligibility cond2 blocked LINE no Club send
Preconditions: No Ocean Club; LINE present with isBlockLine=true
Expected_Result: Customer eligible; SMS queued

Scenario_Name: Eligibility cond3 registered not send
Preconditions: Customer has LINE unblocked or has Ocean Club
Expected_Result: Not eligible; no SMS sent

Scenario_Name: E02 used internally no user message
Preconditions: Line Connect returns code E02
Expected_Result: E02 consumed internally; no user-facing message

Scenario_Name: E13 Generic Error skip and log continue round
Preconditions: 3 target customers; 2nd returns E13
Expected_Result: #2 skipped+logged no retry; #1/#3 processed; round not stopped

Scenario_Name: Out-of-3-conditions reply skip and log
Preconditions: Line Connect reply with channel=null or isBlockLine=null
Expected_Result: Record skipped+logged separately; round continues

Scenario_Name: API down retry 3 then stop round and email
Preconditions: Line Connect service down/timeout/5xx for all calls
Expected_Result: 3 retries with delay; stop round; standard failure email to IT+User naming step; no partial send

Scenario_Name: In-round dedup by fname/lname/mobile MIN(issue_date)
Preconditions: Same customer with 2 eligible policies issue_date 2026-05-10 and 2026-05-13
Expected_Result: One transaction referencing 2026-05-10 policy

Scenario_Name: Dedup tie-break equal issue_date MIN(policy_no)
Preconditions: Same customer 2 policies same issue_date policy_no 2445901/2445055
Expected_Result: Transaction references policy_no 2445055; deterministic on re-run

Scenario_Name: Cross-round history dedup no resend
Preconditions: WELCOME_NEW_CUST_LINE has matching policy_no+policy_type+fname+lname sms_sent_date NOT NULL
Expected_Result: Record excluded; no duplicate SMS

Scenario_Name: Template resolution schedule then default
Preconditions: sms_message_schedule with and without active template row
Expected_Result: Uses schedule text when present else SMS_CATEGORY default

Scenario_Name: Missing customer name skip and log do not send
Preconditions: Eligible record whose card_no has no name in Customer Data Analytics
Expected_Result: Record skipped+logged; no SMS; stored sent_status='F' sms_sent_date NULL

Scenario_Name: Variable substitution with active campaign link
Preconditions: cf_catalog LINE_LINK active within window; customer name Somchai
Expected_Result: $(var1)=name and $(var2)=active link inserted

Scenario_Name: Campaign link active-window boundary
Preconditions: cf_catalog rows with begin/expire/active_flag boundary combos on 2026-05-14
Expected_Result: Row selected only when within window and active_flag='Y'

Scenario_Name: No active link stop round and email
Preconditions: No cf_catalog LINE_LINK active on processing day
Expected_Result: No SMS whole round; failure email to IT+User; recoverable via Manual Fix

Scenario_Name: CSV file naming convention UTF-8 Buddhist-era year
Preconditions: Completed target set for datetime 2026-05-16 10:00:00
Expected_Result: UTF-8; name MKT_CSMS_MKTWelcomeNewCust_260516100000.csv

Scenario_Name: Thai content and filename format integrity
Preconditions: Target records with Thai names and Thai SMS body
Steps: 1. Generate and read CSV as UTF-8
Expected_Result: Thai renders correctly no mojibake; exact filename segments

Scenario_Name: Send via central ESB to SMS Gateway
Preconditions: Eligible customer with built message and generated file
Expected_Result: ESB web service called forwarding to SMS Gateway; return status captured

Scenario_Name: CSMS_LOG records refer_no and returned status
Preconditions: Send attempt returns status and refer_no
Expected_Result: CSMS_LOG row with refer_no create_date sms_category_name_abbr sms_message

Scenario_Name: WELCOME_NEW_CUST_LINE persists all mandatory fields
Preconditions: A processed send record
Expected_Result: All fields present incl created_by='SYSTEM_BATCH' created_date

Scenario_Name: sent_status semantics S vs F for reconcile
Preconditions: One sent record and one skipped/failed record
Expected_Result: Sent: sent_status='S' sms_sent_date=send time; Skipped/failed: 'F' sms_sent_date NULL

Scenario_Name: credit_amount via existing CSMS logic
Preconditions: Thai template message ~140 chars ~2 credits
Expected_Result: credit_amount computed by reused CSMS credit logic

Scenario_Name: Round-level failure standard alert email
Preconditions: Round fails at file/ESB/DB/API-down/no-link step
Expected_Result: Standard email to IT+User naming batch=BATCH-CSMS-WELCOME-LINE and failed step

Scenario_Name: Manual Batch triggered from central dashboard
Preconditions: Batch listed on existing central Manual Fix screen
Expected_Result: Processes only selected range on existing UI (no new UI)

Scenario_Name: Manual Fix date-range validation
Preconditions: IT Admin on 2026-07-09
Steps: 1. Enter start=2026-07-10 or end<start 2. Click Manual Batch
Expected_Result: Standard validation message; processing not started

Scenario_Name: Manual Batch idempotent no resend
Preconditions: Selected range partly run; some rows sms_sent_date NOT NULL
Expected_Result: Sent rows not resent; only sms_sent_date IS NULL reprocessed

Scenario_Name: Repair date interpreted as round date T-1
Preconditions: IT Admin selects repair date 2026-05-15
Expected_Result: Pulls policies issue_date=2026-05-14 reproducing missed round

Scenario_Name: Daily round no auto-retry of F only Manual Fix
Preconditions: Rows sent_status='F' sms_sent_date IS NULL from prior round
Steps: 1. Run daily round 2. Run Manual Fix range
Expected_Result: Daily skips F rows; Manual Fix picks only sms_sent_date IS NULL

Scenario_Name: Daily report reconcile with policy_type breakdown
Preconditions: Completed round with sent/failed/excluded records
Expected_Result: Totals processed/S/F/excluded-by-reason by ORD/IND/PA reconcile 100%

Scenario_Name: Adversarial input in name and card_no neutralised
Preconditions: Record with SQLi/XSS/control/LIKE-metachar in fname/card_no
Steps: 1. Build message 2. Query Line Connect 3. Write file/DB
Expected_Result: Values treated literally; no SQL exec; no script render/exec; no crash

Scenario_Name: PDPA no PII leakage and link integrity
Preconditions: Successful send with synthetic PII
Steps: 1. Inspect CSMS_LOG file and alert email
Expected_Result: No raw card_no/full PII leak beyond design; link matches active cf_catalog link

Scenario_Name: Concurrent daily and manual run no double send
Preconditions: Daily round and Manual Batch same date start together
Steps: 1. Run both concurrently for same customer
Expected_Result: Exactly one SMS via sms_sent_date guard/run lock

Scenario_Name: Validation feedback and zero/empty report state
Preconditions: Invalid Manual Fix range; a day with zero eligible customers
Steps: 1. Validate range 2. Render report for zero-day
Expected_Result: Standard validation blocks submit; report shows clean zero/empty state

Scenario_Name: End-to-end one customer at most one SMS
Preconditions: Customer eligible this round, recurs next round, and in a Manual Fix range
Steps: 1. Run daily 2. Run next daily 3. Run Manual Batch
Expected_Result: Exactly one Welcome SMS total; single sms_sent_date NOT NULL row
